excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Cardiology lists Main application period opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-02-28. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 28 February 2026 (Non-local) 31 May 2026 (Local)
